description: This clutch from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion.Dimensions : 27 cm x 30 cmBlack brocade silk upper with a cut out detail that acts as a handleDouble magnetic buttoned closureFabric innerOne buttoned pocket insideHandle can be folded over for a different lookCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
